'''Ranif Parlan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Biography==
As late as [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Ranif Parlan was serving as the commanding officer of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']] assigned to patrol duty in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

Soon after the Rebel [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|victory]] at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]], Parlan captured the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Quist (pirate)|Quist]] and ordered his execution. Quist tried to bargain for his life, offering information about the long-believed dead tactician and hero of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]. The captured pirate revealed that he had aided Tallon in faking his death to escape from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TM" />

Parlan reported this new information to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who ordered Parlan to capture Tallon alive. Not having many resources for this task, Parlan issued an Imperial bounty for Tallon, designation [[Imperial Bounty 82,471|82,471]]. This bounty was accepted by [[Jodo Kast]] and his associates, [[Zardra]] and [[Puggles Trodd/Legends|Puggles Trodd]], as well as [[Droid/Legends|droid]] bounty hunter [[IG-72]]. Parlan also ordered Quist to infiltrate Tallon's home, among his allies, just to have an ace up his sleeve when Kast arrived.<ref name="TM" />

Unbeknownst to Parlan, one of his officers, [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Dana (Rebel Alliance)|Dana]], was really a secret agent from the Alliance. Dana jumped ship while the ''Relentless'' docked at [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] to report his discovery to the Alliance. Jodo Kast managed to kill Dana, but an Alliance squad recovered the information from her [[Datapad/Legends|data storage pad]].<ref name="TM" />

This Rebel team outsmarted and out-skilled both Kast's team and IG-72, and escaped from Tatooine with Adar Tallon, who then joined the Rebel Alliance. Due to the failure of his operation, Parlan was considered responsible of the disaster. He tried to apologize to Vader, but the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] executed Parlan using the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="TM" />

Parlan was replaced by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Westen]] as commanding officer of ''Relentless''.<ref name="RC">''[[The Star Wars Rules Companion]]''</ref>
